reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text: recently picked up the Bose portable speaker, and it exceeded my expectations in every way. The sound is incredibly clear, with rich bass and crisp highs that stay balanced even at full volume. The build quality feels premium and durable, and the compact size makes it easy to carry anywhere. Battery life is solid, giving me hours of uninterrupted use. Bluetooth connection is fast and stable, with no drops. Overall, this speaker delivers the perfect mix of portability, power, and Bose-quality sound. Highly recommended.

It shuts off frequently when trying to connect to a device and also randomly shuts down at times. I've  tried resetting it but the issues continue. If it didn't sound so good, I'd pitch it and try something else. I'm hesitant to recommend it, but will do so with the above caveat.

reviews.author: BMunster

reviews.title: Great portable speaker
reviews.text: Bought as a gift initially and wound up buying one for myself after hearing the sound quality first hand. I wasn't sure at first if I'd use this much vs just listening to music directly on my phone but the sound really is so much better and louder than on my phone. The portability is great and I've used this poolside, outside doing yardwork, while cooking, all kinds of casual moments where I wanted to not sit in silence but didn't want my phone nearby. The battery lasts quite a while and charges fairly quickly. The only downside is that I had one issue when I replaced my phone with the app as my speaker refused to recognize my new phone and it eventually required a full deletion of the app and reset

reviews.author: CesarC

reviews.title: Boss speaker
reviews.text:
Surprisingly powerful for its size — and it’s been through a few adventures!”
I’ve been using the Bose SoundLink Flex for a few months, and it’s become my go-to speaker for everything — cooking in the kitchen, picnics at the park, and even poolside lounging. The sound is rich and full, with bass that feels much bigger than its compact design. I accidentally left it outside during a sudden rainstorm, and it kept playing without skipping a beat — the waterproof and dustproof build is no gimmick!
Battery life comfortably lasts me through a full weekend trip without charging, and pairing with my phone is instant every time. If I had to nitpick, I wish the charging cable was a bit longer, but that’s minor compared to how much I enjoy it. This little speaker makes every moment feel like a soundtrack.
